scripts.self-check: npm run check:config && node --check scripts/init-harness.mjs && node --check scripts/apex-doctor.mjs && node --check scripts/test-installer-fixtures.mjs && node scripts/apex-manifest.mjs new --config=profiles/minty.workflow.json --slug=self-check --issue=none --mode=planning --surface="apex workflow extraction" --downshift="planning: workflow package extraction, no target app code" --browser="skip: docs and scripts only" --typecheck="skip: no target app typecheck needed" --required="node scripts/check-config.mjs --config=profiles/minty.workflow.json --target=/mnt/d/CURSOR/minty" --force && node scripts/apex-manifest.mjs check --config=profiles/minty.workflow.json --slug=self-check && node scripts/apex-manifest.mjs summary --config=profiles/minty.workflow.json --slug=self-check && node scripts/apex-manifest.mjs finish --config=profiles/minty.workflow.json --slug=self-check --verified="node scripts/check-config.mjs --config=profiles/minty.workflow.json --target=/mnt/d/CURSOR/minty" --skipped="browser: docs and scripts only" --next="none" && npm run test:fixtures
